title: Saudi Kookoora with Fermented Twist
description: A unique Saudi dish with a fermented twist. This recipe combines the flavors of traditional kookoora with the tanginess of fermented ingredients.

ingredients.name: Fermented Turnips
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade fermented turnips

ingredients.name: Saudi-Style Flatbread
ingredients.notes: Traditionally made with wheat flour, water, and salt

ingredients.name: Kookoora
ingredients.notes: A traditional Saudi side dish made with fried onions and sometimes meat

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: Use yellow or white onions for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Use fresh garlic for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste based on the fermented turnips

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Add freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add sliced onions and cook until golden brown, stirring occasionally.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add chopped kookoora and stir to combine with onions and garlic.
Add chopped fermented turnips and stir to combine with the kookoora mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Optional: Top with additional chopped fermented turnips and a sprinkle of black pepper.
